name: native enforcement passes a clean file when the routed tool is absent (a real verdict, not incomplete)
command: printf 'resource "x" "y" {}\n' > ok.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file ok.tf --tools checkov 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && grep -q 'fallback=native' e.txt && echo native-passes-clean 1>&2
